response.justification: The candidate exceeds the required 6+ years of full-stack experience with a strong track record in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud tools like AWS CDK, alongside direct experience with AI-agent infrastructure and testing frameworks like Vitest. Their open-source contributions, architectural versatility, and emphasis on testing and process improvement align closely with the role’s needs, though limited German proficiency may slightly hinder local collaboration.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with core stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) and AI-agent development
Proven ability to design and deploy scalable systems using cloud, Docker, and Kubernetes
Strong culture of testing, documentation, and knowledge sharing via workshops and open-source projects
concerns: German language skills are only basic, potentially limiting local team integration
Some roles involve legacy stacks (DLang, C++) which may suggest fragmentation over focus
Resume lacks explicit mention of Nest.js, PostgreSQL, or Playwright — though skills are transferable
